items.title: Sanaa Lathan Says Filming “Love & Basketball” ‘Wasn’t Fun, It Was Hard’
items.description: 'Love & Basketball' premiered in April 2000, starring Lathan, Omar Epps, Regina Hall, Gabrielle Union and Tyra Banks, to name a few

items.description: The singer and actress shares the teens with ex-husband Marc Anthony

items.title: Jennifer Garner Says Fans 'Lose Their Minds' When Seeing Her and “13 Going on 30” Costar Judy Greer Together
items.description: Garner and Greer both starred in the 2004 rom-com and have reunited for season 2 of 'The Last Thing He Told Me'

items.title: Eric Dane Shared Touching Words About Rebecca Gayheart in Final Interview Before His Death
items.description: The late actor and Gayheart married in 2004 and welcomed two daughters together before separating in 2018

items.title: Paul Mescal and Gracie Abrams Make Their Red Carpet Debut at the 2026 BAFTA Awards
items.description: The actor received a nomination for best supporting actor for his role as William Shakespeare in 'Hamnet'
